ul.li: HeaderSection: Fixed size metadata (LSN, RecordType, TransactionID).
page_id: uint64_t identifier of the targeted storage page.
offset: uint32_t byte offset within the page where the update occurs.
old_len / new_len: uint32_t sizes of payload buffers.
CRC32: IEEE 802.3 polynomial, computed over bytes [0, N-4].
Memory Alignment: If record exceeds 4096B, it spans multiple log segments.
Padding: No implicit padding; alignment must be handled by the LogManager.

ol.li: Byte Order: All multi-byte integers are stored as Little-Endian.
Zero-Length: If old_len or new_len is 0, the corresponding variable field is omitted (0 bytes consumed).
Atomic Writes: Records are intended to be written in a single pwrite call to the WAL log.
